name: Ursa
description: It is my spirit that keeps me safe, and not mere armor.

abilities.name: Maul
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage based on Ursa's current health.

abilities.name: Earthshock
abilities.description: Applies stacks of Fury Swipes to all enemy units within the radius upon landing.

abilities.name: Overpower
abilities.description: Grants Ursa attack speed bonus and slow resistance bonus for a number of subsequent attacks.

abilities.name: Fury Swipes
abilities.description: Consecutive attacks to the same enemy deals more damage. If the same target is not attacked after a period of time, the bonus damage is lost.

abilities.name: Enrage
abilities.description: Goes into a frenzy, removing all existing debuffs while providing damage reduction and status resistance. Enables Ursa to Enrage at his will, even while being disabled. Reduces cooldown.
